column1: Hey Caden, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
cool i got you, which destination were you lookin to book?
Yea cancun is a fire spot its like the staple of spring break
how many ppl in your group so far?
word that a solid group! we all from the same school?
bet what school? I'll hook it up with a good group rate
12 of us are from the university of alabama then two are from university of massachusetts
nicee yea we had groups from both school with us last year, will hook it up fs
y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
preferably looking to see prices right now to get back to my group about
got you, i'll send what i have now but keep in mind prices changes pretty often this time of year
cool if i send through email? Its a little long for text
cool whats the best email for you?
just sent, lmk if you got it bro
word bro lmk what the squad thinks, i can also hook it up with a discount on some of the prices you see, just lmk which package we wanna narrow in on
whats good Caden, how we feelin about the options so far?
good everyone is talking to parents about it now trying to figure out what they wanna do so just getting down to the bottom of everything
aight bet bet. How'd your parents respond to it all?
were they cool with it lol
Wordd thats good. atleast they down
lmk how things shaking out with the others
yerr checkin in Caden, how we lookin so far?
Caden brotha whats good, did we wanna lock in that cancun option?

hey so sorry for the late response was busy with finals then had to travel home just got home last night. Everyone is kinda up in the air right now because of the holidays right around the corner we may wait a little or just go w less people
word all good. still will be a dope trip even if its like 4-6 of you!
Only seeing whats good because we've had things sell out on some groups, similar situation ppl waiting on others. so want to make sure it doesn't happen to anyone again lol
perfect thank you i'll let u know
Caden brotha checkin in, squad make any decisions on what we wanna do?
hey! everyone is busy right now I think ima just text our group and whoever wanna do cancun we just do it
I mean yea! thats the best way to do it, everyone will end up wanting to hop in once it's started. usually how it works
ya i'm just done waiting to big of a group to satisfy everyone
dont wanna miss out waiting. lmk how things shaking or if you need me to send you anything else I got you
Loved “dont wanna miss out waiting. lmk how things shaking or if you need me to send you anything else I got you”
hey checkin in, how things lookin on your end so far?
sup Caden, did we want to make a move on that cancun option?
we are currently deciding on how we are gonna split up and who's going where
fire bro, i can also switch around who's in what room, so you guys dont gotta worry about it right this second
rather get you guys locked in then worry about that later than potentially miss out lol
no same they are just being difficult i'll figure it out soon
haha all good, just lmk and i can get a reservation started for you guys
Whats up Caden happy new year! did we want to get a reservation set up for you guys?
question how many rooms do you still have available in cancun
I dont have access to the full inventory, I just know when its all gone lol
can you tell me how the grand oasis is
because i see all these horrible reviews online I was just wondering ur honest opinion on it
Yea fs. If you're lookin for a true college spring break experience, like party all day every day, lots of other students, peak spring break vibe, Oasis is the spot
It comes with its downsides. Food isn't the best, and the room amenities are overall, ok
hey Caden whats up, how things lookin on your end
we are meeting up wed night to figure out who's going or not
okay bet hmu after then and we'll get things in motion
question how is the other resort i remember seeing the other resort you guys do through cancun

Krystal, its pretty cool. not as lit as Grand O but its a cool vibe a little more chil super nice, white marble when you walk in. a lot smaller than Grand O, less rowdy, short walk to all of the off-resort nightlcubs in the party center
ok i think a smaller group of us are gonna go to cancun and probably do that one i know some where worried abt the foot situation at the other one
yea I like the Krystal personally
food is def a little better. but overall at an all inclusive international resort, I will say, def dont expect gourmet meals
gets the job done tho for sure. in between partying, pool, beach
Loved “gets the job done tho for sure. in between partying, pool, beach”
ok perfect i'll let them know
how much would that one be
youll want to click on the Krystal option. these are sample quotes btw just so you can see pricing
hey checkin in, we narrow in on which option we wanna roll with?
sup! we still lookin to get situated for spring break?
we finally got the crew together
dope! I'll send the updated rates. how many ppl do we have
bet! were y'all ready to get things in motion tonight?
lmk if we wanna do 4 nights or 5
Word I'll send a sample quote rn so you can check it out
ok does it include the flights also?
or do we do that part on our own
flights you want to get separately on your own to save money. best way to do it
heres sample 5 night pricing right now
for sure, lmk which one we wanna roll with and i can get you a reservation started
ok bet what are the dates
so if we wanna do the max amount of days you offer
when would we be going to cancun
but we can do more for sure. theres no limit
i thought the max was 5 nights
nah we can do however many days you want. most ppl do 5 its the sweet spot
just obv, the more days, the more expensive it s
they wanna do 6 nights if that's fine
aight bet sounds good. we ready to get things set up and locked in?
here's them both together for a example https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/JKLWUXREIL
we don't all have to be 21 for this right
because last place we called they said you had to be 21 to book
nah not for the Krystal or Grand O
ok we are gonna do one less person
bet bet. the 6 of you ready to get it secured tn?
aight word I'll get it started rn. I'll send the link over in a few mins
just sent that over. lmk if y'all need help navigating through and getting deposits in
ok perfect when do we need all this filled out by
deposit is $200 and then you get two weeks from now to pay the remaining balance. gives you a little time to get things situated
when does the passport information need to me in my one friends passport comes soon
like can she put that in later
also my payment won't go through
You can skip the passport info for now all good
And what's happening when you try to make a payment
it's saying it's not a valid credit card number
Okay bet. if you have any other issues just lmk
hey Caden does Jessica still plan on going on the trip?
just need her to pay her balance so we can get the group situated
i thought she already paid it
which one is it because we have two jessica's
she said she thought she paid everything does it say what she owes
she made her first payment of $200 on the 17th, that was the only one
hey whenever you get a chance, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so that we can coordinate airport transfers for the group
Liked “hey whenever you get a chance, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so that we can coordinate airport transfers for the group”
hey question! do you know what's going to happen about the trip with everything going on right now
yoo! Everything is still a go, all hotels and vendors have been operating as normal, and there is no travel restrictions
just wanted to check in i put my flight info and had everyone else as well we are all on the same flight
okay and how about Beltran is he on the same flight as anyone else?
I see your flight, the rest of the group on the same flight as you?
word locked in bro all set
youl get an email with some more info soon
Liked “youl get an email with some more info soon”
hey we are having a small issues with the email. one of the emails on their is wrong how do we fix that. it's supposed to be nataliejurcik101@yahoo.com
Hey bro, he's not able to log into his account?
she's able to log in with her actual email but the email chain we receive with jude the other information isn't the right email
And okay, that means that the email on her account is incorrect. She's able to update that when she logs in
that's the weird part her login is the right email but the chain email we are getting has the wrong one in
Lol also noticed I've said bro so many times, apologies on that too
But yea I'll update that when I get back in. You able to send her all of the info you have though?
There were two emails, those are really the only ones going out
About the transportation and then about pre departure
yes i was able to send her the information
no need to apologize I am a guy so bro is completely fine man lol
Lol oh you got a mixed group!
Lol word. Aight cool, lmk if anything else comes up

I had a quick question. One of our friends are now coming with us. She tried to book through you guys but it was full so she just did it through the resort. Is there any way for her to pay to transport with us to the hotel or should I just tell her to get a private transportation and one of us can just go with her.
Yea unfort she won't be able to join in on the transportation
ok perfect that's what i assumed just wanted to make sure
do we book the booze cruise and party package before we leave for the trip or can we do it when we get to the resort
lets do it before you go. y'all would just have to pay the balance off by tonight
how many nights out did you want to do?
everyone is all over the place right now would we be able to do it tomorrow or when we get there?
yea today is cool just lmk. you can also do it once you get there im just not sure what pricing will be or what will be available

hey last question sorry about how many times I keep texting you about this stuff. So we have a small issue. One of our friends who are going on the trip has a family emergency last night and had to fly home. She still going on the trip just her flight lands 30 mins after us. She tried going on the website but obviously it wouldn't let me change her flight information because it was to close to the time we leave. Should we just do private transportation instead and meet you at the resort?
Hey nah all good. Lmk her name and new flight details
ok perfect if they all decide they do wanna do the private transportation because of our one friend going as well i'll lyk they are all getting back to me right now

ok they all decide they wanna do the private transportation since someone's parent is paying for it. So now when we get to the resort should I just text you or will it be obvious where you guys are stationed.
so youre all taking your own transportation?
okay. what time is your transportation service and what approx time will you be arriving at the resort?
ill let our team know so theyre ready for you on arrival
they are getting us around 2:30 so we would probably be at the resort around 3:30
our flight got delayed just to let you know until 1:05 pm
bet aight all good ops team is tracking your flight # so they are aware
We just got into our ride so we are on the way to the hotel now. Will someone be there at the resort to check us in?
